verses.text: Joshua sends the eastern tribes home, having kept their charge. Sent home. Their duty is done.
Joshua sends the eastern tribes home, having kept their charge. Sent home. Their duty is done.
Joshua sends the eastern tribes home, having kept their charge. Sent home. Their duty is done.
Joshua sends the eastern tribes home, having kept their charge. Sent home. Their duty is done.
He bids them love the LORD and keep His commandments. The charge. Devotion is the parting word.
He bids them love the LORD and keep His commandments. The charge. Devotion is the parting word.
They return to Gilead with their spoil. Returned. They go to their land.
They return to Gilead with their spoil. Returned. They go to their land.
They return to Gilead with their spoil. Returned. They go to their land.
They build a great altar by Jordan; Israel prepares for war. Alarm. It seems an act of revolt.
They build a great altar by Jordan; Israel prepares for war. Alarm. It seems an act of revolt.
They build a great altar by Jordan; Israel prepares for war. Alarm. It seems an act of revolt.
Phinehas and the princes are sent to inquire. Inquiry. They seek the truth first.
Phinehas and the princes are sent to inquire. Inquiry. They seek the truth first.
Phinehas and the princes are sent to inquire. Inquiry. They seek the truth first.
They charge the eastern tribes with rebellion. Charge. They fear God's wrath on all.
They charge the eastern tribes with rebellion. Charge. They fear God's wrath on all.
They charge the eastern tribes with rebellion. Charge. They fear God's wrath on all.
They charge the eastern tribes with rebellion. Charge. They fear God's wrath on all.
They charge the eastern tribes with rebellion. Charge. They fear God's wrath on all.
The eastern tribes answer it was not for rebellion. Answer. They clear themselves.
The eastern tribes answer it was not for rebellion. Answer. They clear themselves.
The eastern tribes answer it was not for rebellion. Answer. They clear themselves.
They built it lest the west tribes deny their children a part. The reason. They feared being cut off.
They built it lest the west tribes deny their children a part. The reason. They feared being cut off.
They built it lest the west tribes deny their children a part. The reason. They feared being cut off.
It is a witness, not for burnt offerings. A witness. The altar binds, not divides.
It is a witness, not for burnt offerings. A witness. The altar binds, not divides.
It is a witness, not for burnt offerings. A witness. The altar binds, not divides.
Phinehas is satisfied; God is among them. Satisfied. Peace is restored.
Phinehas is satisfied; God is among them. Satisfied. Peace is restored.
They name the altar 'Ed,' a witness that the LORD is God. Ed. The misunderstanding ends in unity.
They name the altar 'Ed,' a witness that the LORD is God. Ed. The misunderstanding ends in unity.
